agentRecommendation.reasoning: 5184x3456 — highest resolution Bushrangers Bay image in the Commons pool. Shot from Cape Schanck looking BACK into the bay, showing the distinctive rock stacks and bay geometry. Completely distinct from home-cover-01 (looking DOWN from the track) — anti-twinning preserved. Autumn/winter usage is seasonally plausible (taken January but the bay doesn't change). SA override required.

rejected.note: Beach-level view is more postcard-y. Still viable if editor prefers the ground-level perspective.

editorOverrides.reason: CC-BY-SA 4.0 accepted — contingent on blanket SA policy approval.

notes: AWAITING EDITOR SIGNATURE. Contingent on CC-BY-SA policy. Week 3 slot advanced to this sprint.
